fixes: Resolved various display and formatting issues across the application
About page now shows complete release history across all versions

features: Annotate photos with circles, arrows, and text labels to highlight key details
Photos captured offline are queued automatically and upload when connectivity returns
fixes: Fixed annotation drawing not saving correctly and photo gallery not refreshing after edits
Invitation page now displays the organization name and available exercises, and the registration experience for new users has been improved

features: Capture photos during exercise conduct using your device camera or photo library
Browse all exercise photos in a dedicated photo gallery with timestamps and participant names
Attach photos directly to observations for visual documentation of exercise performance
Delete photos and recover them from the recycle bin if needed
View observation details directly from linked photos in the gallery
fixes: Photos are now staged locally and only uploaded when the observation form is submitted, preventing orphaned uploads

features: Import participant lists in bulk from CSV or Excel files with drag-and-drop upload, automatic classification of existing members versus new invitations, and pending invitation tracking

fixes: The install prompt for the Cadence app now remembers your dismissal for 90 days instead of reappearing on each visit

features: Email invitations for organizations and exercises with automated delivery and one-click accept
Smart invitation flow that detects whether a recipient already has a Cadence account and routes them accordingly
Email notification preferences so users can control which messages they receive
Submit feedback, bug reports, and feature requests directly from within the application
Administrators can configure email settings from the system settings page
fixes: Login page now shows a clear error message when credentials are invalid
Improved password field behavior and visibility toggle
New-user invitation flow now correctly creates the account, accepts the invitation, and sets the organization context in one step

features: Exercise Evaluation Guide (EEG) for HSEEP-compliant structured evaluation: define Capability Targets and Critical Tasks, then record P/S/M/U-rated assessments against them during conduct
EEG entries can be viewed grouped by Capability Target or Critical Task for quick coverage review
Drag-and-drop reordering of Critical Tasks and Capability Targets
Link MSEL injects to the Critical Tasks they are designed to test
Generate EEG summary documents showing capability coverage and performance ratings
EEG entries are accessible from the Observations page for a unified evaluation view
fixes: Observation timestamps now display correctly in the local timezone
EEG entry layout is more compact and readable on tablet and laptop screens
Fixed an issue where the loading indicator could appear incorrectly on the MSEL page

features: Inject approval workflow: injects follow a Draft, Submitted, Approved process before an exercise can go live, supporting HSEEP compliance and organizational governance
Configurable approval permissions per organization, including self-approval policies and role-based approval authority
Submit injects for approval directly from the MSEL table row or the inject detail drawer
Batch approve or reject multiple injects at once from the MSEL view
Editing a submitted or approved inject automatically reverts it to Draft for re-review
Organization management section added to the sidebar for administrators
fixes: After submitting an inject for approval, the view now returns to the MSEL as expected
Approval permissions are now saved reliably when configuring organizational settings
breaking: Inject statuses have been updated to HSEEP-compliant terminology (e.g., 'Fired' is now 'Released', 'Pending' is now 'Draft'). Existing exercises will be migrated automatically.

features: Filter the user management list by account status and organization membership
Improved user management page layout and usability
Version update notifications are now less intrusive with an improved About page
fixes: Fixed a session refresh issue that could cause intermittent logouts

features: Role-aware home page dashboard showing your active exercises, upcoming assignments, and quick actions
My Assignments view with exercises grouped by status (Active, Upcoming, Completed)
In-app notifications for exercise updates and role assignments
Exercise clock with start, pause, stop, and reset controls for real-time exercise pacing
Clock-driven and facilitator-paced conduct view modes for different exercise styles
Time-based inject sections: Ready to Fire, Upcoming, Later, Fired, and Skipped
Narrative view for Observers showing 'The Story So Far' and 'What Is Happening Now'
Layout mode toggle (Classic, Sticky Header, Floating Chip) for the conduct page
Observations panel for Evaluators during active exercises with quick entry (keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+O)
Observation-to-inject linking with clickable references for traceability
Capability tagging on observations for structured evaluation
Sort, filter, group, and search injects within the MSEL
Drag-and-drop inject reordering with real-time sync across connected users
Exercise objectives with inject-to-objective linking for traceability
Exercise status workflow: Draft, Active, Completed, and Archived with confirmation dialogs
Exercise duplication including phases, objectives, and all MSEL injects
Practice mode toggle to run exercises without affecting official records
Exercise participant management with HSEEP role assignment (Exercise Director, Controller, Evaluator, Observer)
Inline user creation when adding participants to an exercise
Organization-scoped capability library with FEMA, NATO, NIST CSF 2.0, and ISO 22301 frameworks
Capability Library administration page for managing and importing predefined capability sets
Exercise settings for confirmation dialogs, clock mode, and timing configuration
Expanded timezone support with 67 global timezones
Excel export for MSEL data and observations with enhanced templates
Full exercise package export as ZIP (MSEL, Observations, Summary)
MSEL import from Excel with upload, sheet selection, column mapping, and validation wizard
Reports page with exercise data export options
Real-time sync via SignalR for injects, observations, and clock state across all connected users
Offline capability with local data caching, action queuing, and automatic sync on reconnect
Conflict resolution with notification dialog when offline changes conflict with server state
Progressive Web App (PWA) support for installing Cadence on your device
Breadcrumb navigation throughout the application
Role-based sidebar navigation with collapsible menus
Versioning and release notes with 'What is New' notification on updates
Organization management with multi-tenant data isolation and organization switching
Complete authentication system with login, registration, remember me, and cross-tab logout
Three-tier role-based access control: System Roles, Organization Roles, and Exercise Roles
fixes: Fixed character counter showing incorrect text in the exercise name field
Fixed file picker opening twice when clicking Browse Files during Excel import
Fixed unsaved changes warning appearing after a successful exercise creation
Fixed duplicate observations from SignalR race conditions when multiple users are connected
Fixed empty state flash on the exercises list during background data refresh
Fixed objective filter labels not showing the correct objective names
Exercise name now displays correctly in breadcrumbs instead of the exercise ID
Hide the Complete Exercise option for exercises that are already archived
Fixed login redirect loop when the server is unreachable in offline mode
Improved 404 page with a cleaner display showing the attempted URL

features: Create, edit, view, and manage exercises with full lifecycle support
MSEL inject management with status tracking (Pending, Fired, Skipped, Deferred)
Fire injects with confirmation dialog and user preference persistence
Inject detail drawer with description preview and delivery method indicators
Drag-and-drop inject reordering
Real-time exercise clock with start, pause, stop, and reset controls
Dual time tracking: scenario time and wall clock time
Responsive design for tablet and desktop use
fixes: Fixed authentication handling when the server is unreachable
